MeasureTheory.Measure.InnerRegular.measu.tactic:
obtain ⟨ε, hε, hεs, rfl⟩ : ∃ (ε : _)(_ : ε ≠ 0), ε + ε ≤ μ s ∧ r = μ s - (ε + ε) := by
  use (μ s - r) / 2
  simp [*, hr.le, ENNReal.add_halves, ENNReal.sub_sub_cancel, le_add_right]
rcases hs.exists_isOpen_diff_lt hμs hε with ⟨U, hsU, hUo, hUt, hμU⟩
rcases (U \ s).exists_isOpen_lt_of_lt _ hμU with ⟨U', hsU', hU'o, hμU'⟩
rcases H.exists_subset_lt_add h0 hUo hUt.ne hε with ⟨K, hKU, hKc, hKr⟩
refine' ⟨K \ U', fun x hx => hsU' ⟨hKU hx.1, hx.2⟩, hd hKc hU'o, ENNReal.sub_lt_of_lt_add hεs _⟩

calc
  μ s ≤ μ U := μ.mono hsU
  _ < μ K + ε := hKr
  _ ≤ μ (K \ U') + μ U' + ε := (add_le_add_right (tsub_le_iff_right.1 le_measure_diff) _)
  _ ≤ μ (K \ U') + ε + ε := by
    apply add_le_add_right; apply add_le_add_left
    exact hμU'.le
  _ = μ (K \ U') + (ε + ε) := add_assoc _ _ _

wittStructureInt_prop.tactic: have := wittStructureRat_prop p (map (Int.castRingHom ℚ) Φ) n

  AlgHom.coe_toRingHom, map_wittStructureInt]

SimpleGraph.Preconnected.ofBoxProdRight.tactic:
classical

exact ⟨w.ofBoxProdRight⟩

MeasureTheory.Measure.add_haar_eq_zero_o.tactic:
calc
  ∞ = ∑' _ : ℕ, μ s := (ENNReal.tsum_const_eq_top_of_ne_zero h).symm
  _ = ∑' n : ℕ, μ ({u n} + s) := by
    congr 1; ext1 n; simp only [image_add_left, measure_preimage_add, singleton_add]
  _ = μ (⋃ n, {u n} + s) := Eq.symm <| measure_iUnion hs fun n => by
    simpa only [image_add_left, singleton_add] using measurable_id.const_add _ h's
  _ = μ (range u + s) := by rw [← iUnion_add, iUnion_singleton_eq_range]
  _ < ∞ := Bounded.measure_lt_top (hu.add sb)
simpa only [image_add_left, singleton_add] using measurable_id.const_add _ h's

Pell.eq_of_xn_modEq_le.tactic:
have x0 : 0 < xn a1 0 % xn a1 n := by
  rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt (strictMono_x a1 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero npos))]
  exact Nat.succ_pos _

exact
  x0.trans
    (eq_of_xn_modEq_lem3 _ (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero npos) (Nat.succ_pos _) (le_trans ij j2n)

      rw [n1, i2] at ij'; exact absurd ij' (by decide))

UniformSpace.metrizable_uniformity.tactic:
obtain ⟨U, hU_symm, hU_comp, hB⟩ :
  ∃ U : ℕ → Set (X × X),
    (∀ n, SymmetricRel (U n)) ∧
      (∀ ⦃m n⦄, m < n → U n ○ (U n ○ U n) ⊆ U m) ∧ (𝓤 X).HasAntitoneBasis U := by
  rcases UniformSpace.has_seq_basis X with ⟨V, hB, hV_symm⟩
  rcases hB.subbasis_with_rel fun m =>
      hB.tendsto_smallSets.eventually
        (eventually_uniformity_iterate_comp_subset (hB.mem m) 2) with
    ⟨φ, -, hφ_comp, hφB⟩
  exact ⟨V ∘ φ, fun n => hV_symm _, hφ_comp, hφB⟩
set d : X → X → ℝ≥0 := fun x y => if h : ∃ n, (x, y) ∉ U n then (1 / 2) ^ Nat.find h else 0

have hd_symm : ∀ x y, d x y = d y x := by
  intro x y
  simp only [@SymmetricRel.mk_mem_comm _ _ (hU_symm _) x y]
have hr : (1 / 2 : ℝ≥0) ∈ Ioo (0 : ℝ≥0) 1 := ⟨half_pos one_pos, NNReal.half_lt_self one_ne_zero⟩
letI I := PseudoMetricSpace.ofPreNNDist d (fun x => hd₀.2 (Setoid.refl _)) hd_symm
have hdist_le : ∀ x y, dist x y ≤ d x y := PseudoMetricSpace.dist_ofPreNNDist_le _ _ _
rcases UniformSpace.has_seq_basis X with ⟨V, hB, hV_symm⟩

rcases hB.subbasis_with_rel fun m =>
    hB.tendsto_smallSets.eventually
      (eventually_uniformity_iterate_comp_subset (hB.mem m) 2) with
  ⟨φ, -, hφ_comp, hφB⟩
exact ⟨V ∘ φ, fun n => hV_symm _, hφ_comp, hφB⟩
simpa only [not_exists, Classical.not_not, eq_self_iff_true, true_iff_iff] using h
exact ⟨fun ⟨m, hmn, hm⟩ hn => hm (hB.antitone hmn hn), fun h => ⟨n, le_rfl, h⟩⟩
refine' PseudoMetricSpace.le_two_mul_dist_ofPreNNDist _ _ _ fun x₁ x₂ x₃ x₄ => _
by_cases H : ∃ n, (x₁, x₄) ∉ U n
refine' fun n hn => ⟨n, hn, fun x hx => (hdist_le _ _).trans_lt _⟩
rwa [← NNReal.coe_pow, NNReal.coe_lt_coe, ← not_le, hle_d, Classical.not_not, Prod.mk.eta]
refine' fun n _ => ⟨n + 1, trivial, fun x hx => _⟩

rwa [← NNReal.coe_two, ← NNReal.coe_div, ← NNReal.coe_pow, NNReal.coe_le_coe, pow_succ',
  mul_one_div, NNReal.div_le_iff two_ne_zero, div_mul_cancel _ (two_ne_zero' ℝ≥0), hle_d,
  Prod.mk.eta]

exists_continuous_forall_mem_convex_of_l.tactic: choose U hU g hgc hgt using H

obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := PartitionOfUnity.exists_isSubordinate isClosed_univ (fun x => interior (U x))
  (fun x => isOpen_interior) fun x _ => mem_iUnion.2 ⟨x, mem_interior_iff_mem_nhds.2 (hU x)⟩

refine' ⟨⟨fun x => ∑ᶠ i, f i x • g i x,
  hf.continuous_finsum_smul (fun i => isOpen_interior) fun i => (hgc i).mono interior_subset⟩,
  fun x => f.finsum_smul_mem_convex (mem_univ x) (fun i hi => hgt _ _ _) (ht _)⟩

Equiv.Perm.signAux_mul.tactic:
refine'
  prod_bij (fun a _ => signBijAux g a) signBijAux_mem _ signBijAux_inj
  (by simpa using signBijAux_surj)
by_cases h : g b < g a
simp only [not_le_of_gt hab, mul_one, mul_ite, mul_neg, Perm.inv_apply_self, if_false]
split_ifs with h₁ h₂ h₃ <;> dsimp at *
rw [dif_neg h, inv_apply_self, inv_apply_self, if_pos hab.le]
by_cases h₁ : f (g b) ≤ f (g a)

have : f (g b) ≠ f (g a) := by
  rw [Ne.def, f.injective.eq_iff, g.injective.eq_iff]
  exact ne_of_lt hab
